query:
SELECT 
  s.planName,
  s.customerName,
  s.monthlyCost as currentCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue as currentRevenue,
  bi.externalId as biExternalId,
  bi.description as biDescription,
  bi.lineAmount as biLineAmount,
  bi.unitAmount,
  bi.quantity,
  sba.assignmentBucket
FROM services s
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.supplierName = 'ChannelHaus'
  AND s.monthlyCost = s.monthlyRevenue
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
ORDER BY s.customerName, s.planName;
command:

SELECT 
  s.planName,
  s.customerName,
  s.monthlyCost as currentCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue as currentRevenue,
  bi.externalId as biExternalId,
  bi.description as biDescription,
  bi.lineAmount as biLineAmount,
  bi.unitAmount,
  bi.quantity,
  sba.assignmentBucket
FROM services s
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.supplierName = 'ChannelHaus'
  AND s.monthlyCost = s.monthlyRevenue
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
ORDER BY s.customerName, s.planName;
